# Dobson Headlight Restoration

> Professional headlight restoration and ceramic coating services based in Lethbridge, Alberta, Canada. Mobile service available — we come to you — or drop off at our shop. Starting at $99 CAD. Rated 5.0 stars on Google and Facebook.

## Services

- **Standard Restoration** ($99+): Multi-step oxidation removal, precision machine polishing, industrial UV Top Coat, 1-Year Clarity Warranty
- **Premium + Ceramic** ($169+): Everything in Standard plus Ceramic Pro 9H Coating, fog light treatment included, 5-Year Clarity Warranty
- **New Light Protection** (Custom Quote): Industrial ceramic coating for factory-new headlights to prevent yellowing, Lifetime Clarity Warranty
- **Fleet Maintenance** ($79+/vehicle): Volume discount for 5+ vehicles, on-site service, DOT compliance check, priority booking
- **Heavy Duty / Semi** ($149+): Specialized restoration for large truck lenses, deep oxidation removal
- **Dealership Partner** (Wholesale): Maximize resale value on pre-owned inventory, same-day turnaround

## Service Area

Lethbridge, Taber, Cardston, Raymond, Coaldale, Coalhurst, Fort Macleod, Glenwood, Magrath, and surrounding Southern Alberta communities.

## Contact

- Phone: 587-402-4794
- Email: dobsonheadlights@gmail.com
- Website: https://dobsonheadlightrestoration.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DobsonHeadlightRestoration
- Book an appointment: https://koalendar.com/e/meet-with-isaac-dobson

## Hours

Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM (early morning and late evening bookings available on request)

## About

Dobson Headlight Restoration is Lethbridge's #1 rated mobile headlight restoration specialist serving Southern Alberta. Services include standard oxidation removal, premium Ceramic Pro 9H coating, fleet vehicle programs, and dealership partnerships. All work comes with a re-do warranty. Service takes 60–90 minutes. No presence required — digital payment available.
